meta.title: Exploitable Vulnerabilities (Weaknesses) Hidden Deep In ICS
meta.description:
Mark Carrigan of PAS looks at a different type of vulnerabilities, really more of weaknesses or flaws related to the process that can be exploited by an attacker with automation and engineering skills. He goes over examples ubiquitous weaknesses (found in most systems) and unique weaknesses (specific to a vendor / model). 

He also covers the number of classic vulnerabilities by ICS vendor.
